skill.name: xiaohongshu-copywriter
skill.description: Generates Xiaohongshu post copy from product details, including three notes, titles, hashtags, and cover ideas.
skill.summary: Create Xiaohongshu marketing notes with titles, hashtags, and cover concepts.
skill.author: Hermes-Sedimentary

security_audit.summary: The static weak cryptography finding at SKILL.md:4 is a false positive because the line is a product description, not code. The entropy heuristic at SKILL.md:1 is also dismissed; the file is readable Markdown with Chinese text and no encoded payload, prompt injection, scripts, network access, or command execution evidence.

low_findings.title: False positive: weak cryptographic algorithm
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged SKILL.md:4, but the line is a Chinese-language skill description. No cryptographic algorithm, secret handling, or executable code is present. Verdict: FALSE_POSITIVE.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The cited line contains only front matter description text. There is no semantic evidence of cryptographic behavior or unsafe security logic.

low_findings.title: False positive: high entropy heuristic
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged SKILL.md:1 for high entropy, but the file is readable Markdown and YAML front matter. The apparent entropy is consistent with short multilingual text, not binary, encrypted, or obfuscated content. Verdict: FALSE_POSITIVE.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Manual review found plain text across the file and no encoded payload. The static signal is weak because multilingual text can raise entropy in small files.

content.value_statement: Writing Xiaohongshu posts takes time when product details, selling points, and tags must fit one campaign. This skill turns those inputs into complete note drafts with titles, hashtags, and cover ideas.
actual_capabilities: Generates three complete Xiaohongshu note drafts from product details and selling points.
Creates title options for each post concept.
Provides cover image ideas to pair with each note.
Supports marketing content workflows for individuals, freelancers, small businesses, and teams.
limitations: It does not verify current Xiaohongshu trend data or platform ranking signals.
It cannot guarantee sales, engagement, or viral performance.
Users must review claims, regulated language, and brand accuracy before publishing.
It generates text and ideas only; it does not publish posts or create final image assets.

use_cases.title: Launch a New Product
use_cases.description: Turn product features, benefits, and target audience details into three ready-to-edit Xiaohongshu note drafts.

use_cases.title: Prepare Client Content
use_cases.description: Create post directions, titles, hashtags, and cover concepts for client approval before production.

use_cases.title: Scale Weekly Posting
use_cases.description: Produce repeatable post drafts from campaign briefs so a team can review and schedule faster.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Product Post
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner prompt for a single product.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create Xiaohongshu copy for this product: [product]. Key selling points: [points]. Target audience: [audience]. Include three notes, titles, hashtags, and cover ideas.

prompt_templates.title: Campaign Variations
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate three Xiaohongshu notes for [product] using different angles: problem solving, lifestyle benefit, and user proof. Include title options, hashtags, and cover ideas.

prompt_templates.title: Audience-Specific Drafts
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate prompt for a defined buyer group.
prompt_templates.prompt: Write Xiaohongshu posts for [audience] who care about [needs]. Use these product details: [details]. Make the tone [tone] and include cover concepts.

prompt_templates.title: Launch Content Pack
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced prompt for a structured launch brief.
prompt_templates.prompt: Build a Xiaohongshu launch content pack for [product]. Include three notes, hooks, titles, hashtags, cover ideas, key claims to verify, and revision notes for brand review.

output_examples.input: A hydrating serum for dry skin, aimed at office workers.
output_examples.output: Three note drafts focused on office air conditioning, fast morning routines, and night repair, each with titles, hashtags, and cover ideas.

output_examples.input: A portable coffee grinder for travelers and outdoor users.
output_examples.output: Post concepts covering compact packing, fresh coffee outdoors, and gift appeal, with suggested titles, tags, and visual cover directions.

output_examples.input: A beginner yoga course for busy professionals.
output_examples.output: Three Xiaohongshu-style drafts that frame the course around stress relief, short daily practice, and improved posture.

best_practices: Provide clear product details, target audience, price range, and proof points.
Review every claim for accuracy, compliance, and brand voice before publishing.
Ask for several angles when testing hooks, titles, or cover concepts.
anti_patterns: Do not publish generated copy without checking factual claims and regulated wording.
Do not rely on the skill for live trend research or competitor monitoring.
Do not use vague inputs such as only a product name when campaign quality matters.

faq.question: What does this skill generate?
faq.answer: It generates three Xiaohongshu note drafts with titles, hashtags, and cover ideas from product and selling point inputs.

faq.question: Can it create final cover images?
faq.answer: No. It suggests cover concepts, but users need separate design or image tools for final assets.

faq.question: Does it know current Xiaohongshu trends?
faq.answer: No. It does not include live trend research, so users should verify current topics separately.

faq.question: Is it suitable for client work?
faq.answer: Yes. It can create drafts and directions for client review, but final copy should be edited by a human.

faq.question: Can Claude, Codex, and Claude Code use it?
faq.answer: Yes. The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.

faq.question: What input improves output quality?
faq.answer: Include the product, audience, benefits, proof points, tone, price range, and any words to avoid.
